intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered, mid-band hall, LDK smoke test, no carport. 10x10 lot gives a 6x6 envelope = 36 m2 floor -- the published minimum for this topology (true floor is ~9.9x9.9, confirmed by bisection; 9.9x9.9 also solves but 10x10 is the round-number published minimum, matching the bath_ld precedent). Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; a hallway is tucked into the same middle band between master (front) and standard (rear) -- all bedroom and bath doors open onto the hall, never directly onto the public side. Public side is a real living/dining/kitchen split stacked front-to-rear -- the hall's open mouth connects to dining (the middle-row public room), not living.
must_haves: common bath accessible from the hall
clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
mid-band hallway between master and standard
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms stacked front-to-rear
